answers: Work-life balance: set boundaries (no work after 6pm), prioritize health, schedule personal time, and learn to say no.
Tips: don't check email after hours, use all your vacation days, make time for hobbies, and protect weekends.
Balance looks different for everyone — find what works for you rather than following someone else's formula.
Kaj ar jibon er balance: shomoy bhag koro, kaj er por kaj niye na bhabo, ar nijer jonno shomoy rakho.
